@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+summary: Summarization building blocks (content extraction + prompt builders).
+---
+
+# `@steipete/summarizer`
+
+Single workspace package with two entry points:
+
+- `@steipete/summarizer/content` – link content + transcript extraction (Firecrawl optional, YouTube transcript resolution, optional cache adapter)
+- `@steipete/summarizer/prompts` – pure prompt builders + enums/maps

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+{
+  "name": "@steipete/summarizer",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "Summarization building blocks (content extraction + prompt builders).",
+  "type": "module",
+  "main": "./dist/esm/index.js",
+  "module": "./dist/esm/index.js",
+  "types": "./dist/types/index.d.ts",
+  "exports": {
+    ".": {
+      "types": "./dist/types/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/esm/index.js"
+    },
+    "./content": {
+      "types": "./dist/types/content/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/esm/content/index.js"
+    },
+    "./prompts": {
+      "types": "./dist/types/prompts/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/esm/prompts/index.js"
+    }
+  },
+  "files": [
+    "dist"
+  ],
+  "scripts": {
+    "build": "pnpm run build:esm",
+    "build:esm": "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@types/sanitize-html": "^2.16.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "cheerio": "^1.1.2",
+    "es-toolkit": "^1.43.0",
+    "sanitize-html": "^2.17.0"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+{
+  "extends": "./tsconfig.base.json",
+  "compilerOptions": {

+}
